title: illipe pallida
intro: Illipe pallida is a type of tree native to Southeast Asia, scientifically known as Shorea faguetiana. The tree is valued for its seeds, which contain a rich source of illipe butter, a natural emollient and moisturizer. The medicinal properties of illipe pallida include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions, such as skin irritations and infections. Illipe butter can be used in herbal preparations, such as creams, salves, and ointments, to provide soothing and moisturizing benefits to the skin, promoting healthy skin and hair.
